## Privacy checklist

- [ ] Any wire captures or binary fixtures included have been processed through `tools/redact.py`.
- [ ] No real serial numbers, customer IDs, or local IPs appear in code, docs, fixture bytes, or commit messages.
- [ ] Hex dumps or NDJSON snippets in PR description / commit messages are also redacted.
- [ ] If new tools or fields were added, the README's tools table is updated.
